title: solidago nemoralis subsp. decemflora
intro: Solidago nemoralis subsp. decemflora, also known as the woodland goldenrod, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Solidago nemoralis subsp. decemflora include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
